description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex set within a spacious, landscaped lot. The structure features multiple interconnected volumes with a mix of flat and gable roofs, and the exterior is clad in a combination of brick and dark paneling. The property includes a circular driveway with a central fountain, manicured hedges, and a variety of trees and shrubs. A large swimming pool and patio area are situated at the rear, accompanied by outdoor seating and garden features. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large panes providing ample natural light. The main entryway is marked by a prominent gate, a path flanked by tall trees, and a formal, welcoming design.
description: A modern, multi-volume brick and dark-paneled house with landscaped grounds, a circular driveway, and a backyard pool. The design features flat and gable roofs, large windows, and a formal entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, central fountain, main entry path, and formal landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facades, window arrangements, and the expanse of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, outdoor seating, and garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, patio, and the rear architecture of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Formal entry with a central path, flanked by tall trees, a prominent gate, and a circular driveway with a fountain
